meta_description: Cedric is a full-stack software engineer, focusing on frontend development. He mostly operates in the world of TypeScript.
page_home_landing_description: I am a software developer and feel at home in the world of TypeScript. Currently, I work as a frontend engineer at {#a}Finanzfluss{/a}.
page_home_projects_subtitle: Here you can find a selection of past projects that I have worked on in my free time. Mostly out of fun or to learn something new.
page_home_projects_p01_description: As a leisure project during my studies, this resulted in a Spotify clone to manage and stream music in the local home network.
page_home_projects_p02_description: A somewhat quirky packaging for a gift: A wooden box that opens via a toggle switch. The catch: The box automatically toggles the switch back using a mechanical arm.
